LAB flux-quality (FLUX.2 Dev FP8)

1. Load official FLUX.2 Dev workflow in ComfyUI
2. Weights via download-flux --tier quality
3. Prefer FP8 split checkpoints under /models/comfy
4. Higher fidelity than Klein NVFP4; slower

Download: bazelisk run //scripts:run-utility -- download-flux run --tier quality
